prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GT3582R turbocharger** (hybrid billet wheel, 0.82 A/R turbine housing) paired with a **McLaren M838T (3.8L V8 twin-turbo) engine** to push boost from 1.3 bar (stock) to 1.8 bar, requiring a **Motec M150 ECU** with custom fuel maps and **ID1000x injectors** for stoichiometric AFR at 750+ WHP on E85.

Install a **Pectel SQ6M standalone ECU** with **McLaren 650S-specific CAN bus integration** for seamless OEM sensor compatibility, paired with a **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** (dual-port) and **TurboSmart Race Port BOV** to eliminate compressor surge under aggressive gear shifts.

Replace the stock **McLaren 650S carbon-ceramic brakes (394mm front, 380mm rear)** with **AP Racing CP8660 405mm front/390mm rear discs**, **6-piston CP8660 calipers**, and **Ferodo DS3000 pads**, along with a **Hydratech brake bias adjuster** for track-focused stopping power.
estetica: Fit a **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS McLaren 650S widebody kit** (carbon fiber, 50mm extended fenders) with **custom Vorsteiner V-FF 107 20x11 ET45 front / 21x13 ET50 rear wheels** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R 305/30/20 (front) / 355/25/21 (rear)** tires for aggressive stance and aero optimization.

Install a **Novitec McLaren 650S-specific front splitter** (carbon fiber, 3D-scanned for OEM fitment) with **Novitec rear diffuser** and **active Gurney flap** (electronically adjustable via CAN bus), paired with a **Vorsteiner GT-S rear wing** (carbon fiber, 1,200mm span, 3-position angle adjustment).

Replace the stock **McLaren 650S LED taillights** with **Luxx Customs sequential RGB taillights** (CAN bus-controlled, OEM-style housing) and add **Novitec carbon fiber side skirts** with integrated **LED door projectors** (McLaren logo projection, 10,000-lumen output).
